title: SFTV Earth 2 (Official Modpack)
description: This is the official modpack for the server SFTV Earth 2! It includes many client side mods to improve the QOL of minecraft.
body:
![Banner of Earth From Space with the SFTV Earth 2 Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf15be49fce13f9336b6c1b41128a3b5e8a0efda_0.webp)
# SFTV Earth 2 is Here!

The long awaited geopol earth server is finally here, for you to join! Create your own country or join one! The literal world awaits

## What this Modpack Includes:
- QOL mods like JEI, Jade, Litematica, and Journeymap- To improve your gameplay experience!
- Detail mods like Wakes, Continuity, Distant Horizons, and Falling Leaves- to beautify your world!
- High quality shaders like BSL, Complementary, and Miniature- Perfect for high end performance or low end, and even options for distant horizons compatibility!
- Custom Item Textures with unique textures for exclusive items on SFTV Earth 2 server, like brews and such!

## What the Server Includes:
- Amazing plugins like towny, dynmap, raildest, and trains- designed for the perfect geopol experience
- Gamechanging plugins like factory, brewery, and horse enchancer
- An earth map that is custom made for a peak minecraft earth experience!

## Other:
Join us on [Discord](https://discord.gg/P5J87fNE6h[Discord](https://discord.gg/P5J87fNE6h)), if you haven't already!

Join the [SFTV Discord](https://discord.gg/f229kZVb37) as well!

> _This project was brought to you by the hardworking team at SFTV_
